sourceMovie.title: Don't Worry Darling
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Don't Worry Darling (2022) stuck because it commits to its science fiction premise without apologizing—viewers remember set pieces and momentum as much as plot. Olivia Wilde's control of tone keeps the ride coherent. The science fiction and mystery blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Sound of My Voice
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Don't Worry Darling clicked for you, Sound of My Voice (2011) is a strong next stop: both trade in science fiction and mystery, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: The Stepford Wives
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Don't Worry Darling clicked for you, The Stepford Wives (1975) is a strong next stop: both trade in science fiction and mystery, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Don't Worry Darling?
faq.answer: Try Sound of My Voice, The Stepford Wives, Wifelike—each shares DNA with Don't Worry Darling while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Don't Worry Darling?
faq.answer: Don't Worry Darling (2022) is best described as Science Fiction, Mystery, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Don't Worry Darling worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.8/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this science fiction lane.
